# lib

Empty `pkgs`-parameterized Nix library stub; intended home for project-local utility functions scoped with `with pkgs.lib`.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Returns empty attrset; `pkgs`-parameterized, `with pkgs.lib` scoped. No exported symbols yet. |

## API Surface

No exports currently. Intended pattern from placeholder comment:

```nix
hexint = x: hexvals.${toLower x};  # hex char → int via attrset lookup
```

Add functions inside the top-level attrset returned by `default.nix`.

## File Relationships

`lib/default.nix` consumed by root [default.nix](../default.nix) or [overlay.nix](../overlay.nix) as project-local lib extension alongside `pkgs.lib`. Parallel to [modules/](../modules/) (NixOS modules) and [overlays/](../overlays/) (package overrides) but strictly for pure utility functions.
